All 6 messages are triaged with a priority and one-line reason (coverage complete). m5 wire is correctly flagged high with a BEC warning, m2 copyedit deadline is flagged high tied to the Jun 17 deadline and Friday send. m4 newsletter is correctly marked IGNORE. m1 renewal is HIGH (defensible given active client and PO pending), m3 and m6 land at MED with sensible reasons.
